metadata.name: Provide Documents for a Program Audit

description: A state auditor is conducting an audit of a public housing program and has requested specific case files.

nodes.task_description: Receive the official request from the auditor, identifying the specific case files needed.

expected_outcome.value: The program manager logs the audit request.

nodes.task_description: Search for and retrieve the requested case files from the system.

expected_outcome.value: The manager successfully gathers all requested digital case files.

nodes.task_description: Provide the documents to the auditor through a secure transfer method.

expected_outcome.value: The manager securely transmits the files to the auditor.
